events.event_description: George Wadsworth presented credentials as Diplomatic Agent/Consul General, establishing a liaison-level U.S. presence in Syria.

evidence.quote: George Wadsworth, Diplomatic Agent/Consul General. Appointed: 1942-10-09. Credentials presented: 1942-11-30.

events.event_description: Wadsworth was promoted to Envoy Extraordinary and Minister Plenipotentiary, elevating the U.S. mission to a legation.

evidence.quote: George Wadsworth, Envoy Extraordinary and Minister Plenipotentiary. Appointed: 1944-09-21. Credentials presented: 1944-11-17.

events.event_description: James Sayle Moose was promoted to Ambassador Extraordinary and Plenipotentiary and presented credentials, elevating the U.S. mission from a legation to an embassy.

evidence.quote: James Sayle Moose, Envoy Extraordinary and Minister Plenipotentiary. Appointed: 1952-06-25. Credentials presented: 1952-08-14. Promoted to Ambassador Extraordinary and Plenipotentiary 1952-09-30.

events.event_description: Embassy Damascus was reclassified as a Consulate General following Syria's incorporation into the United Arab Republic.

evidence.quote: [Mission Note] Embassy Damascus was reclassified as a Consulate General on February 25, 1958. The mission was re-established as an Embassy on October 10, 1961.

events.event_description: The U.S. mission in Damascus was re-established as an Embassy, with Ridgway Brewster Knight serving as Chargé d'Affaires ad interim.

evidence.quote: [Mission Note] Embassy Damascus was reclassified as a Consulate General on February 25, 1958. The mission was re-established as an Embassy on October 10, 1961.

events.event_description: Syria severed diplomatic relations with the United States, ending the U.S. Embassy presence.

evidence.quote: Syria severed diplomatic relations with the United States on 1967-06-06. Note: Smythe left post on June 8, 1967.

events.event_description: The United States established an Interests Section in the Italian Embassy in Damascus, resuming a limited diplomatic presence after the break in relations.

evidence.quote: [Mission Note] On February 8, 1974, the United States established an Interests Section in the Italian Embassy with Thomas J. Scotes as Principal Officer.

events.event_description: The U.S. Embassy in Damascus was re-established, with Thomas James Scotes serving as Chargé d'Affaires ad interim.

evidence.quote: The Embassy in Damascus was re-established on June 16, 1974.

events.event_description: The U.S. Embassy in Damascus suspended operations and all U.S. personnel were withdrawn due to deteriorating security conditions during the Syrian civil war.

evidence.quote: [Mission Note] The U.S. Embassy in Damascus suspended operations on February 6, 2012, and all U.S. personnel were withdrawn after security conditions deteriorated in the midst of the Syrian civil war.
